description_long: This is a braided loaf of bread with a golden-brown, glossy crust, generously sprinkled with coarse white sugar crystals. The surface displays a distinct braided pattern, with each segment slightly puffed and separated by deep, curved grooves. The crust appears slightly crisp and shiny, while the interior is soft and airy, as seen from the exposed ends. The loaf is elongated and moderately thick, with a gentle taper at both ends. The sugar crystals add a decorative and textural contrast to the otherwise smooth, shiny surface. This bread resembles a traditional challah or sweet braided bread, often found in bakeries or at festive urban markets.
description: A golden-brown braided loaf of bread with a shiny crust and coarse sugar crystals, featuring a soft, airy interior and decorative braiding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the braided loaf, highlighting the glossy crust and sugar crystals.
description_view_1: End view revealing the soft, airy interior and the rounded, braided segments with visible sugar on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view of the loaf, displaying the braided pattern and golden-brown crust with sugar crystals.
description_view_3: Other end view showing the exposed, fluffy interior and the detailed braiding at the loaf's tip.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features a braided pattern with deep, curved grooves and is topped with coarse white sugar crystals. The surface is glossy and golden-brown, with a slightly crisp texture and decorative sugar scattered across the top.
